results.title: Music Lessons with Austin Artists: Learn to DJ with DJ CASS&RA
results.snippet: Cassie Shankman, aka DJ CASS&RA, gives us a lesson on DJing. Shankman is an Austin-based composer, orchestrator, pianist and DJ. She's worked with film, visual artists, chamber groups, wind ensembles, apps, musicals and music therapy technology.
results.tier_reason: Major regional TV station (ABC affiliate, Austin)

results.title: Sounds by Cassandra — Official Agency Website
results.snippet: SOUNDS BY CASSANDRA is a multifaceted audio agency run by award-winning musician/producer DJ Cassandra. Clients include Sports Illustrated, Gucci, Goldman Sachs, NASCAR, Teen Vogue, Google, Bumble, Apple TV+, SXSW, Adidas, Kendra Scott, Dell, NBC, Virgin, The Recording Academy, Tito's Vodka, Franklin's BBQ.
results.tier_reason: Official artist/agency website

results.title: Lululemon Ambassador — Sound of Austin Summer Playlists
